title: dolicholobium riuense
intro: Dolicholobium riuense is a plant species, belonging to the family Gesneriaceae, that is native to the Philippines. The plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues and fever, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Dolicholobium riuense include its use as an expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in traditional medicine, where it is typically dried and used in tea infusions or made into tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
